narrative:
New Lyme Twp township has 657 registered voters, with 50.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.7 percentage points.
